author: Ethan
name: LongContext 4096 + Int4 16L + Full SOTA Stack
blurb: Full PR #549 SOTA stack with three combined changes: (1) 16 transformer layers via int4 nibble-packing (2 weights/byte, GPTQ-lite clip search), fitting 45% more depth in 16MB; (2) train_seq_len=4096 so each token sees 4095 causal context tokens, with dynamic NTK auto-scaling rope_base to ~48550; (3) all PR #549 techniques preserved: LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, SmearGate, BigramHash, XSA-4, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, VE128, EMA+SWA, Parallel Muon, OrthoInit, Legal TTT.
